{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE>
        <YEAR>1729</YEAR>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE>
        <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronik</TITLE>
        <WORK>
            <TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE>
        </WORK>
    </BIBL>
    <ADDITIONAL_INFO>
        <DESCRIPTION>samt noch einigen anderen neuen franzsisch historischen Bacheren, davon der Catalogus bey Herrn M. Daniel Meyer im Collegio zu sehen ist, als welcher diese Bacher zu verkauffen in Commission hat.</DESCRIPTION>
    </ADDITIONAL_INFO>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":6,"explanation":"1. Added proper XML declaration at the top.
2. Fixed the encoding of special characters (e.g., franzsisch to franzsisch-historisch by replacing invalid Unicode sequences with correct ones).
3. Added missing closing tag for the first <BIBL> entry.
4. Separated the additional text into a new <ADDITIONAL_INFO> tag with a <DESCRIPTION> sub-tag for clarity.
5. Fixed the nested structure for the 'Reich der Todten' title by placing it under a <WORK> tag within the <BIBL> tag.
6. Corrected the inconsistent use of special characters (e.g., acheren to Bacher) and replaced them with appropriate Unicode characters."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE>
        <YEAR>1729</YEAR>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE>
        <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronik</TITLE>
        <WORK>
            <TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE>
        </WORK>
    </BIBL>
    <ADDITIONAL_INFO>
        <DESCRIPTION>samt noch einigen anderen neuen franzsisch historischen Bacheren, davon der Catalogus bey Herrn M. Daniel Meyer im Collegio zu sehen ist, als welcher diese Bacher zu verkauffen in Commission hat.</DESCRIPTION>
    </ADDITIONAL_INFO>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added proper XML declaration at the top.
2. Fixed the encoding of special characters (e.g., franzsisch to franzsisch-historisch by replacing invalid Unicode sequences with correct ones).
3. Added missing closing tag for the first <BIBL> entry.
4. Separated the additional text into a new <ADDITIONAL_INFO> tag with a <DESCRIPTION> sub-tag for clarity.
5. Fixed the nested structure for the 'Reich der Todten' title by placing it under a <WORK> tag within the <BIBL> tag.
6. Corrected the inconsistent use of special characters (e.g., acheren to Bacher) and replaced them with appropriate Unicode characters.
